case_title: RODRIGUEZ, JOSE NOEL VS CAMP AMERICANA JAVA JUICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAMP AMERICANA JAVA JUICE, INC.
